feed.title: EMERGE-group
feed.subtitle: EMERGE is a cross-faculty research group at NMBU uniting three research groups with complementary expertise in genome regulation, bioinformatics, and evolutionary biology.

entry.title: We have a website!
entry.content: A new cross-faculty research group - EMERGE - has emerged. Fjellheim-, Hvidsten-, and Sandve-labs will sit together (part-time) to inspire each other, collaborate, and hatch out new cutting edge research proposal ideas.
entry.summary: A new cross-faculty research group - EMERGE - has emerged. Fjellheim-, Hvidsten-, and Sandve-labs will sit together (part-time) to inspire each other, collaborate, and hatch out new cutting edge research proposal ideas.
